scope: Regulation Time Winner Yes/No outcome selection
assertions: Knockout event top primary actions show advancing teams only and do not show Draw as a top primary action.
Regulation Time Winner remains available as a lower market with Team A, Draw, and Team B rows.
Each Regulation Time Winner row exposes separate Yes and No buttons when backed by binary markets.
Tapping a No button opens the trade ticket with contract side No.
Spread line choices render as a horizontally scrollable tick rail instead of squeezed full-width options.
